query:
-- 查询杭州在cities表中的ID
SELECT id, name FROM cities WHERE name = '杭州';

-- 查询partner_cities表中杭州的cityId
SELECT pc.id, pc.cityId, c.name as cityName, pc.profitRatioStage1Partner
FROM partner_cities pc
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE c.name = '杭州';
